items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the 'Annual renewal requirement' as specified in the linked use case. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the implementation or functionality of this requirement. The absence of any related evidence indicates a lack of clarity on whether this requirement is satisfied, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
